home.createGroups: Create groups, place your predictions, and compete with friends.
home.signInToTrack: Sign in to track your performance!
home.noGroupsYet: You haven't joined any groups yet.

dashboard.deleteWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain. All your bets, memberships, and points will be permanently erased.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete? all your bets will be deleted forever
dashboard.noPointsYet: No points yet — scores update as matches finish.

groupStage.ensurePicks: Please ensure all Main Picks and Bonus Picks are selected.
groupStage.rankingsDesc: Drag or use arrow buttons to rank teams 1st–4th in each group. Scored via Kendall-Tau distance.
groupStage.savedSuccess: ✅ Predictions saved successfully! You can edit them any time before the deadline.
groupStage.pageDesc: Place your bets before the first match kicks off. Once saved, they are locked when the tournament begins.
groupStage.lockedMsg: 🔒 Locked. Group stage bets are now closed.
groupStage.deadlineMsg: Deadline: Bets lock at {deadline} (1 hour before first kick-off). Save early!

knockout.notOpenDesc: Knockout matches will appear here round by round as the admin adds them after the group stage concludes.
knockout.pageDesc: Predict the exact score at the end of 90 minutes for each match. Each match locks 1 hour before kickoff.

group.noLeagues: You haven't joined any friend leagues yet. Join or create one above!
group.championDetails: Congratulations {name}! You scored {points} points and took 1st place overall.
